name: Gekomon

signature_move.name: Crush Symphony
signature_move.description: Crushes the enemy from within using ultra-high frequency vibrations.

description: Current Original ⇨ Japanese An Amphibian Digimon that charms those around it with a pleasant voice that is hard to imagine by looking at its bizarre appearance. The chords produced from the three holes at the tip of its tongue and the ad-libbing of the horn coiled around its neck allow it to control the opponent's emotions as it pleases. It is rumored to be born when a famous piece is written in music composition software, so it has become sort of a status symbol among the musicians of the world. Its Special Move is crushing the enemy from within using ultra-high frequency vibrations ( Crush Symphony ).
